description: Use this API to disconnect all of the load from the specified bus, and reconnect it to a designated bus. Bus TOBUS must not have any load connected to it at the time this API is called. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = moveloads(ibus, newbus)

parameters.name: ibus
parameters.description: Bus on which one or more loads currently exist. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: newbus
parameters.description: Bus to which the loads on bus ibus are to be moved. (input; no default allowed).

error_codes.description: IBUS and NEWBUS are the same bus.
NEWBUS already has loads (move individual loads).
node-breaker terminal connection table is full.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
